name: Swim spa install
description: Swim spa (4-6m shell, 2-3 tonne dry): heavier crane, bigger slab, higher electrical load. Prices are ex GST and are YOUR defaults - edit them in Settings > Price templates.

lineItems.details:
Hire and operation of an excavator with rubber treads to minimise damage caused to thoroughfare. Excavate and level existing earth/soil in preparation for the installation of the spa. Removal and disposal of soil (clean load).

If loads are mixed or contaminated (asbestos) these will be quoted after consulting the customer - this is a precaution, unlikely to apply. Green waste or rubbish removal (e.g. pond) is not included and will vary depending on quantity - approx $1,000-$2,000 plus GST per load, or a skip bin arranged at no extra cost if cheaper. If rock is found underground, additional charges will be quoted after consulting the customer - allow approx $200 per cubic metre for excavation.
lineItems.notes: Includes machine hire and tip fees

lineItems.details: Supply and lay SL82 Grade D500L prefabricated ribbed welded wire steel with equal spacing of 200mm square apertures to provide tensile strength and crack control to the concrete slab.
Supply, pour and finish Hi Strength 32 MPA concrete at 150mm in thickness with fine sand and 20mm aggregate for strength bonding in an 80-100 slump mix.
lineItems.notes: Engineer's detail required for shells over 2.5t

lineItems.description: Crane hire - larger unit for swim spa lift
lineItems.notes: 60t city crane typical for over-house lifts

lineItems.description: Swim spa delivery, positioning and levelling
Heavy-duty electrical run from switchboard, trenched

lineItems.details:
Supply and installation of a wired electrical circuit of 32 amps protected in conduit in accordance with AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules to provide power for the swim spa.

Supply and installation of circuit protection devices using a miniature circuit breaker to protect against the risk of a short circuit.

Supply and installation of a weatherproof industrial switch in order to isolate the circuit if necessary or in case of an emergency.
lineItems.notes: Switchboard upgrade quoted separately if needed

lineItems.details: Supply and lay Besser block concrete retaining wall, 1m high, including steel.
lineItems.notes: Only required where site levels need retaining - remove if not applicable

lineItems.description: Surface water drainage for in-ground spa installation
lineItems.details:
Supply and install Everhard 450 series pit made of durable UV resistant polypropylene which will provide excellent drainage of surface water in any application.

Supply and install a high quality 180W sump pump with a vortex impeller that handles soft solids up to 18mm in diameter, has a 7m head and can pump out 150 litres per minute, equipped with an automatic float switch.

High quality and durable high pressure PVC will be used to pump water out, including a one way check valve to prevent water from returning to the pit, alongside a barrel union in line to easily remove the pump for clean up purposes.

Pipe will be run to the closest existing stormwater line and cut in to provide a drain point for the collected pit water.

All works will be done in accordance with Australian Standard AS3500 and all materials used will be high quality Australian products certified by Bureau Veritas Australia and New Zealand.
lineItems.notes: Only required where surface water drainage is needed - remove if not applicable

lineItems.description: Fill, commission, water balance and handover walkthrough
